description: Task instructions are typed out on the screen for the participant to read.
frame_description: A dark screen with white text being typed out character by character, explaining the user testing task.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to begin the task and navigate to the website.
frame_description: The task instruction screen with an 'Open' button at the bottom center.

description: The browser navigates to the Flight Centre homepage.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The browser tab updates and the page begins to load content for Flight Centre.

description: The Flight Centre homepage content renders, showing the search interface and promotional banners.
page_title: Cheap Flights, Hotels, Holidays & Cruises | Flight Centre
frame_description: The Flight Centre homepage is fully loaded with a red header and a flight search widget.

description: The user moves the cursor towards the search bar, hovering over the 'Where to?' input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves from the bottom of the screen towards the flight search widget in the center.

description: The user clicks on the 'Where to?' input field to initiate a destination search.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Where to?' field in the search widget.

description: A dropdown menu with popular destination suggestions appears below the 'Where to?' input field.
frame_description: A list of popular destinations like Sydney, Melbourne, and Brisbane appears under the search input.

description: The user hovers the cursor over 'Sydney, Australia' in the destination suggestions list.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the first item in the destination dropdown menu.

description: The user clicks on the date selection field to open the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor clicks on the field showing 'Fri, 27 Feb - Sun, 1 Mar'.

description: The date picker modal opens, displaying calendars for February and March.
frame_description: A calendar overlay appears over the search widget.

description: User selects the departure date (March 20, 2026) from the calendar date picker.
page_title: Cheap Flights | Book Flights Online | Flight Centre
frame_description: A date picker modal is open over the Flight Centre homepage, showing February and March 2026 calendars.

description: The user hovers over March 11 in the calendar.
frame_description: The cursor moves across the March calendar, pausing briefly over the 11th.

description: The user hovers over March 18 in the calendar before selecting it.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the 18th of March in the calendar.

description: The user clicks on March 18 to select it as the departure date.
frame_description: The user selects the 18th of March in the date picker.

description: The UI updates to show March 18 as the selected departure date.
frame_description: The 18th of March is highlighted in the calendar UI.

description: The user hovers over March 25 in the calendar before selecting it as the return date.
frame_description: The cursor remains stationary over the 25th of March for several seconds.

description: The user clicks on March 25 to select it as the return date.
frame_description: The user selects the 25th of March in the date picker.

description: The UI updates to show March 25 as the selected return date, highlighting the range.
frame_description: The range between March 18 and March 25 is highlighted in the calendar.

description: The user clicks the 'Done' button in the date picker to confirm their selection.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the blue 'Done' button at the bottom right of the date picker modal.

description: The date picker modal closes, returning the user to the main search interface.
frame_description: The calendar overlay disappears, and the selected dates are visible in the search widget.

description: The date picker modal updates its header to 'Returning travel dates' after the departure date is selected.
frame_description: The modal header changes to prompt for a return date selection.

description: User selects the return date (March 27, 2026) from the calendar date picker.
frame_description: The user clicks on March 27 in the calendar modal.

description: The cursor dwells over the 'Close' button at the bottom right of the date picker modal.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the blue Close button while the user presumably reviews their selected dates.

description: User clicks the 'Close' button to dismiss the date picker modal.
frame_description: The Close button is activated, and the modal begins to close.

description: The date picker modal closes, revealing the main search form with the selected dates populated.
frame_description: The homepage search bar is visible again with 'Fri, 20 Mar - Fri, 27 Mar' in the date field.

description: The cursor hovers over the 'Search flights' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the blue Search flights button.

description: User clicks the 'Search flights' button to initiate the flight search.
frame_description: The search button is clicked, triggering a page transition.

description: The page navigates to the search results. A loading screen is displayed with the message 'Our overhead compartments are stuffed with deals!' and a progress bar.
page_title: Cheap Flights | Book Flights Online | Flight Centre
frame_description: A red and white loading screen with airline logos and a progress bar is shown.

description: The search results page finishes loading, displaying available departing flights from Adelaide to Melbourne.
frame_description: The flight results list appears, showing various airline options and prices.

description: User clicks on a Virgin Australia flight departing at 6:10am to expand fare options.
frame_description: The flight card expands downward to reveal different fare classes.

description: The flight details expand to show 'Lite', 'Choice', and 'Flex' fare types with their respective prices and inclusions.
frame_description: Three fare columns appear below the selected flight.

description: User clicks the 'Select' button for the 'Lite' fare class ($127).
frame_description: The select button for the $127 fare is clicked.

description: A loading overlay appears with the message 'Good choice! It's time to choose your flight for your return journey.'
frame_description: A white loading screen with a blue spinner and text overlay appears.

description: The return flight results load, showing flights from Melbourne to Adelaide for March 22.
frame_description: The 'Select Return Flight' page is displayed with a new list of flight options.

description: User scrolls down the list of return flight results.
frame_description: The page content moves upward as the user scrolls to see more flights.

description: User scrolls back up to the top of the return flight results page.
frame_description: The page content moves downward as the user scrolls back to the top.

description: User clicks on a Virgin Australia flight option to view fare details.
frame_description: The user is on the flight search results page and selects a specific flight.

description: The fare selection section expands below the selected flight, showing Lite, Choice, and Flex options.
frame_description: The UI updates to show different fare types for the selected flight.

description: User hovers over the 'SELECT' button for the Lite fare option.
frame_description: The cursor pauses over the selection button for the cheapest fare.

description: User clicks the 'SELECT' button to choose the Lite fare.
frame_description: The user confirms their fare choice by clicking the button.

description: The 'SELECT' button turns green with a checkmark, indicating the selection was successful.
frame_description: Visual feedback confirms the fare selection.

description: An 'All Set!' overlay with a loading spinner appears, indicating the system is processing the selection.
frame_description: A full-screen loading overlay is displayed.

description: The page navigates to the 'Review trip' step.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the loading overlay to the trip review page.

description: User scrolls down the page to review the trip details and price summary.
frame_description: The user moves down the page to see more content.

description: User hovers over the price summary section on the right side of the page.
frame_description: The cursor dwells over the total price and breakdown.

description: User hovers over the 'CONTINUE' button in the price summary box.
frame_description: The cursor moves to and pauses over the primary action button.

description: User clicks the 'CONTINUE' button to proceed to the next step.
frame_description: The user initiates the next step in the booking process.

description: A loading message 'Thanks for confirming your flights' appears briefly.
frame_description: A transitional loading state is shown.

description: The page navigates to the 'Travellers' details page.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the traveller information form.

description: The traveller details form finishes loading and becomes interactive.
frame_description: The skeleton loaders are replaced by the actual form fields.
